subtitle: late/only vs early/already — the hardest HSK 4 adverb pair
rows: Only if / not until: 你来了我才走
As soon as: 你一来我就走

exA.cn: 他九点才来，迟到了半个小时。
exA.py: Tā jiǔ diǎn cái lái, chídào le bàn ge xiǎoshí.
exA.en: He didn't come until 9 — half an hour late. (later than expected)

exB.cn: 他八点就来了，比谁都早。
exB.py: Tā bā diǎn jiù lái le, bǐ shéi dōu zǎo.
exB.en: He came as early as 8 — earlier than anyone. (earlier than expected)

tip: 才 always implies 'later/less than expected' and often carries a negative tone. 就 implies 'sooner/more than expected' and sounds positive or neutral. This distinction is tested constantly in HSK 4 fill-in-the-blank.

quiz.stem: 电影七点开始，他七点半___到。
quiz.explain: Arriving at 7:30 for a 7:00 movie = late → 才 (later than expected).

quiz.stem: 我们约的九点，她八点___来了。
quiz.explain: Arriving at 8:00 for a 9:00 appointment = early → 就 (earlier than expected).

quiz.stem: 这本书___三十块钱，很便宜。
quiz.explain: Only 30 yuan = less than expected → 才 (emphasizing 'only').

exercises.sentence: 他学了三年中文，___会说一点点。
exercises.context: Three years but only a little = less than expected

exercises.sentence: 她一听到这个消息，___高兴得跳了起来。
这本书我___看了两页，太难了。

subtitle: again (past) vs again (future) — completed vs planned repetition
rows: 不再 (never again, from now on)

exA.cn: 昨天又下雨了，已经连续下了一个星期。
exA.py: Zuótiān yòu xià yǔ le, yǐjīng liánxù xià le yí ge xīngqī.
exA.en: It rained again yesterday — a whole week in a row. (past repetition)

exB.cn: 下次再来的时候，别忘了给我打电话。
exB.py: Xià cì zài lái de shíhou, bié wàng le gěi wǒ dǎ diànhuà.
exB.en: Next time you come again, don't forget to call me. (future repetition)

tip: 又 = already happened again (look for past markers like 了). 再 = will happen again (look for future context, requests, or 下次). A common trap: 他又来了 (He came again) vs 他会再来 (He will come again).

quiz.stem: 这个电影太好看了，我想___看一遍。
quiz.explain: Want to watch again = future plan → 再.

quiz.stem: 他___忘了带钥匙，已经第三次了。
quiz.explain: Forgot again (already happened) → 又.

quiz.stem: 我决定___也不吃那家饭馆的菜了。
quiz.explain: Never again (from now on) → 不再/再也不.

exercises.sentence: 这部电影太好看了，我想___看一遍。
exercises.context: Want to watch again = future plan

exercises.sentence: 他___迟到了，老师很不高兴。
请你___说一遍，我没听清楚。
exercises.context: Say again = request for future action

subtitle: already (current state) vs once (past experience no longer true)
rows: Past experience, may not be true now

exA.cn: 我已经吃过饭了，不饿。
exA.py: Wǒ yǐjīng chī guò fàn le, bù è.
exA.en: I've already eaten — I'm not hungry. (result still relevant)

exB.cn: 他曾经是一名老师，后来改行做了生意。
exB.py: Tā céngjīng shì yì míng lǎoshī, hòulái gǎiháng zuò le shēngyi.
exB.en: He was once a teacher, then switched to business. (no longer true)

tip: 已经 = the result matters NOW (已经毕业了 = graduated and that's my current status). 曾经 = it was true BEFORE but may not be now (曾经住在北京 = used to live in Beijing, but doesn't anymore).

quiz.stem: 她___在法国留过学，所以法语说得很好。
quiz.explain: Past experience (studied in France before) → 曾经.

quiz.stem: 飞机___起飞了，你赶不上了。
quiz.explain: Current state (plane has taken off now) → 已经.

quiz.stem: 这里___是一片森林，现在变成了城市。
quiz.explain: Was a forest before, no longer true → 曾经.

exercises.sentence: 他们___离开了，你来晚了。
这里___是一片草地，现在变成了停车场。
我___吃过饭了，不饱。

subtitle: relatively/quite vs comparing A to B
rows: A 比 B + adj. (+ 多了/一点儿)
Must have two things being compared
Cannot add 很/非常 before adj.
Cannot add 很 after 比

exA.cn: 今天比较冷，多穿点衣服。
exA.py: Jīntiān bǐjiào lěng, duō chuān diǎn yīfu.
exA.en: It's relatively cold today — wear more. (no comparison target)

exB.cn: 今天比昨天冷多了。
exB.py: Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng duō le.
exB.en: Today is much colder than yesterday. (comparing two days)

tip: 比较 = 'relatively' (standalone, no B needed). 比 = 'than' (must have A 比 B). Common error: ×今天比昨天比较冷 — don't use both together.

quiz.stem: 这个城市的交通___方便。
quiz.explain: No comparison target — just 'relatively convenient' → 比较.

quiz.stem: 坐飞机___坐火车快。
quiz.explain: Comparing plane vs train → A 比 B structure.

quiz.stem: 他的中文水平___高，能看中文小说。
quiz.explain: No second item to compare — 'quite high' → 比较.

exercises.sentence: 今天天气___冷，多穿点衣服。
北京的冬天___上海冷多了。
这道菜___好吃，你尝尝。

subtitle: no matter (spoken) vs regardless (formal) — often interchangeable
rows: More flexible, used in daily speech
Both appear in reading; 无论 more in written passages

exA.cn: 不管你怎么说，我都不会改变主意。
exA.py: Bùguǎn nǐ zěnme shuō, wǒ dōu bú huì gǎibiàn zhǔyì.
exA.en: No matter what you say, I won't change my mind. (casual)

exB.cn: 无论遇到什么困难，我们都不能放弃。
exB.py: Wúlùn yù dào shénme kùnnán, wǒmen dōu bù néng fàngqì.
exB.en: Regardless of any difficulty, we must not give up. (formal)

tip: They are nearly interchangeable in meaning. On the HSK 4 exam: if the passage is formal/written, choose 无论; if conversational, choose 不管. Both require 都 or 也 in the main clause.

quiz.stem: ___天气怎么样，他每天都去跑步。
quiz.explain: Casual context (daily routine) → 不管 is more natural. (无论 is also grammatically correct.)

quiz.stem: ___从哪个角度分析，这个方案都是最合理的。
quiz.explain: Formal analytical context → 无论 fits better.

quiz.stem: ___多忙，她都会给父母打电话。
quiz.explain: Personal/spoken context → 不管. (Both are acceptable.)

exercises.sentence: ___刮风下雨，他每天都去锻炼。
___从哪个方面来看，这个决定都是正确的。
___你做什么工作，都应该认真负责。

subtitle: not only — three ways to say it, slight differences
rows: 不仅: formal; 不光: spoken
不但 after subject: 他不但…而且…
不但 before subject: 不但他…而且她也…

exA.cn: 她不但会说中文，而且会写书法。
exA.py: Tā búdàn huì shuō zhōngwén, érqiě huì xiě shūfǎ.
exA.en: She not only speaks Chinese but also writes calligraphy. (standard)

exB.cn: 他不仅是我的老师，还是我的朋友。
exB.py: Tā bùjǐn shì wǒ de lǎoshī, hái shì wǒ de péngyou.
exB.en: He is not only my teacher but also my friend. (slightly more formal)

tip: All three mean 'not only' and are usually interchangeable. Key rule: when two clauses have the SAME subject, put 不但/不仅/不光 AFTER the subject. When subjects DIFFER, put it BEFORE the first subject.

quiz.stem: ___小王通过了考试，小李也通过了。（两个主语不同）
quiz.explain: Different subjects → 不但 before the first subject. (不仅 also works but 不但 is most standard for exams.)

quiz.stem: 这家餐厅___菜好吃，服务也很好。
quiz.explain: Written/formal context → 不仅 fits well. (不光 sounds too casual for written text.)

quiz.stem: 他___会开车，___会修车。
quiz.explain: Same subject, standard usage → 不但…而且/还… All three work here.

exercises.sentence: 他___会说英语，而且会说法语。
___他通过了考试，小李也通过了。
exercises.context: Different subjects: 不但 before first subject

exercises.sentence: 这家店___东西质量好，价格也不贵。

subtitle: since/given that vs unexpectedly — similar pronunciation, opposite meaning

exA.cn: 既然你不想去，那就别去了。
exA.py: Jìrán nǐ bù xiǎng qù, nà jiù bié qù le.
exA.en: Since you don't want to go, then don't. (logical conclusion from a known fact)

exB.cn: 没想到他竟然通过了考试！
exB.py: Méi xiǎng dào tā jìngrán tōngguò le kǎoshì!
exB.en: I didn't expect he actually passed the exam! (surprise)

tip: 既然 = 'since' (you already know this fact, so logically…). 竟然 = 'surprisingly' (you did NOT expect this). They sound similar but work completely differently. HSK 4 loves testing this distinction.

quiz.stem: ___你已经决定了，我就不再劝你了。
quiz.explain: Since you've decided (known fact → logical conclusion) → 既然.

quiz.stem: 他平时不怎么学习，___考了第一名。
quiz.explain: Unexpected result (doesn't study but got #1) → 竟然.

quiz.stem: 这么简单的问题他___不会做。
quiz.explain: Such a simple problem but can't solve it = surprise → 竟然.

exercises.sentence: 没想到他___能一个人完成这么难的任务。
___你已经决定了，那就这样吧。
exercises.context: Since you decided (known fact) = logical conclusion

exercises.sentence: 这么远的路，他___走着来的！

subtitle: two ways to say 'unexpectedly' — neutral surprise vs incredulous surprise
rows: Surprisingly, unexpectedly — stronger, often disbelief or judgment
Reacts emotionally — disbelief, irony, or amazement
Written and spoken; works in essays and news
More colloquial; common in spoken complaints / amazed comments
Tested at HSK 4 (Test 05 Q57, Test 10 Q51)
HSK 5–6 vocabulary — appears in supplementary materials, not the HSK 4 core word list
Subject + 竟然 + V (also after 没想到)
Subject + 居然 + V (also after 没想到) — same slot

exA.cn: 他平时不学习，竟然考了第一名。
exA.py: Tā píngshí bù xuéxí, jìngrán kǎo le dì-yī míng.
exA.en: He doesn't normally study, but unexpectedly came first. (neutral report of surprise)

exB.cn: 你居然敢这样跟我说话！
exB.py: Nǐ jūrán gǎn zhèyàng gēn wǒ shuōhuà!
exB.en: How dare you talk to me like this! (incredulous, emotional)

tip: Both translate as 'unexpectedly / actually'. 竟然 reports the surprise (neutral). 居然 reacts to it — often with disbelief, irritation, or strong amazement. On HSK 4, the answer is almost always 竟然 because 居然 isn't in the core vocab. The distinction matters most when you encounter 居然 in reading or want to use it in writing.

quiz.stem: 天气预报说今天会下雨，结果___一滴雨也没下。
quiz.explain: Neutral 'unexpectedly didn't rain' — reporting the surprise without strong emotion. 竟然 is the HSK 4 default; 居然 would also be acceptable but adds incredulous tone.

quiz.stem: 你___把我的生日忘了，太过分了！
quiz.explain: Strong emotional reaction (accusation, anger) → 居然 fits better. 竟然 would sound too detached for a complaint.

quiz.stem: 我没想到他___一个人完成了这么难的任务。
quiz.explain: After 没想到, both work, but 竟然 is the HSK 4-tested choice (compare Test 05 Q57). 居然 would be slightly more colloquial.

exercises.sentence: 这么简单的问题，他___回答不出来。
exercises.context: Neutral surprise at unexpected difficulty — 竟然 is the HSK 4 default.

exercises.sentence: 你___骗我！我再也不相信你了。
exercises.context: Strong emotional outburst (betrayal, anger) → 居然 captures the disbelief.

exercises.sentence: 她本来只是抱着试试的态度，没想到___得了第一名。
exercises.context: Direct from Test 05 Q57 — 没想到 + 竟然 is the classic HSK 4 collocation.

exercises.sentence: 研究结果___和我们最初的预测完全相反。
exercises.context: Written/academic context — neutral report of an unexpected finding. 竟然 is the unmarked formal choice.

exercises.sentence: 我等了他两个小时，他___连个电话都没打！
exercises.context: Complaint with strong emotional charge → 居然 fits the irritation.

exercises.sentence: 这个孩子才五岁，___能认识这么多汉字。
exercises.context: Positive surprise at a small child's ability — neutral marvelling, no judgment.

exercises.sentence: 这么明显的错误，老板___没发现，真是奇怪。
exercises.context: Result violates what should obviously have happened → 居然 layers in disbelief.

subtitle: contact/connect vs practice — tones and meanings differ
rows: 练习 + skill: 练习口语

exA.cn: 如果有问题，请随时联系我。
exA.py: Rúguǒ yǒu wèntí, qǐng suíshí liánxì wǒ.
exA.en: If you have questions, contact me anytime.

exB.cn: 每天练习半个小时口语，进步会很快。
exB.py: Měitiān liànxí bàn ge xiǎoshí kǒuyǔ, jìnbù huì hěn kuài.
exB.en: Practice speaking for half an hour daily and you'll improve fast.

tip: 联系 (2nd-4th tone) = contact a PERSON. 练习 (4th-2nd tone) = practice a SKILL. The tones are swapped — listen carefully in the listening section.

quiz.stem: 请把你的电话号码给我，方便以后___。
quiz.explain: Exchanging numbers to stay in contact → 联系.

quiz.stem: 为了准备HSK考试，我每天___听力。
quiz.explain: Practicing listening skills → 练习.

quiz.stem: 我们已经很久没有___了，不知道她最近怎么样。
quiz.explain: Haven't been in contact → 联系.

exercises.sentence: 如果有问题，请随时___我。
每天___口语半小时，进步会很快。
我们很久没___了，你还好吗？

subtitle: the three 'de' — which goes where
rows: After modifier → noun: 漂亮的花
After modifier → verb: 高兴地说

exA.cn: 她高兴得跳了起来。（verb + 得 + complement）
exA.py: Tā gāoxìng de tiào le qǐlái.
exA.en: She was so happy she jumped up. (得 links verb to degree complement)

exB.cn: 她高兴地跑过来。（adj. + 地 + verb）
exB.py: Tā gāoxìng de pǎo guòlái.
exB.en: She happily ran over. (地 links adverb to verb)

tip: Formula: ___的+NOUN, VERB+得___, ___地+VERB. The key test: what comes AFTER? Noun → 的. Already have a verb before and describing how well → 得. About to do a verb → 地.

quiz.stem: 他认真___看完了这本书。
quiz.explain: 认真 modifies the verb 看 → adverbial marker 地.

quiz.stem: 他跑___很快，我追不上。
quiz.explain: 跑 + how fast = degree complement → 得.

quiz.stem: 这是我妈妈做___菜。
quiz.explain: 妈妈做 modifies noun 菜 → attributive marker 的.

exercises.sentence: 她高兴___唱起歌来。
请认真___完成作业。
桌子上放着一本新买___书。

subtitle: toward/to — three prepositions for directing actions
rows: Used with giving, doing for someone

exA.cn: 吸烟对身体有害。
exA.py: Xīyān duì shēntǐ yǒu hài.
exA.en: Smoking is harmful to the body. (对 = effect/attitude toward)

exB.cn: 请你给我倒杯水。/ 我向老师请教了一个问题。
exB.py: Qǐng nǐ gěi wǒ dào bēi shuǐ. / Wǒ xiàng lǎoshī qǐngjiào le yí ge wèntí.
exB.en: Please pour me a glass of water. (给 = for someone) / I consulted the teacher about a question. (向 = toward someone)

tip: 对 = attitude/effect ON someone. 给 = doing something FOR someone (transfer). 向 = moving TOWARD someone (direction/request). Common pattern: 对…有影响, 给…打电话, 向…学习.

quiz.stem: 运动___健康有很大的好处。
quiz.explain: Effect on health → 对…有好处.

quiz.stem: 请___我介绍一下这个城市。
quiz.explain: Doing something for me → 给.

quiz.stem: 我们应该___优秀的人学习。
quiz.explain: Learning toward/from someone → 向…学习.

exercises.sentence: 吸烟___身体有害。
请___我倒一杯水。
我们应该___他学习。

subtitle: easy (to do) vs simple (not complex)
rows: Easy to do / likely to happen
容易 + verb: 容易感冒
简单 + noun: 简单的问题
Prone to: 容易生气 (easily gets angry)

exA.cn: 冬天容易感冒，要多喝热水。
exA.py: Dōngtiān róngyì gǎnmào, yào duō hē rè shuǐ.
exA.en: It's easy to catch a cold in winter. (prone to / likely to)

exB.cn: 这道题很简单，大家都会做。
exB.py: Zhè dào tí hěn jiǎndān, dàjiā dōu huì zuò.
exB.en: This question is simple — everyone can do it. (not complex)

tip: 容易 = easy to DO (verb follows) or likely/prone to. 简单 = simple, not complicated (describes a thing). You can say 这道题很简单 AND 这道题很容易, but only 容易 works in 容易感冒 (prone to catching cold).

quiz.stem: 这个问题不___，需要仔细想想。
quiz.explain: The problem is not simple (not complex) → 简单.

quiz.stem: 这种天气特别___让人生病。
quiz.explain: 'Prone to' / likely to → 容易.

quiz.stem: 学中文不___，但是很有意思。
quiz.explain: Not easy to DO → 容易 (describes difficulty of the action).

exercises.sentence: 这个问题很___，大家都会做。
冬天___感冒，要多喝热水。
这件事说起来___，做起来难。

subtitle: sudden — one is also an adjective, the other is adverb-only
rows: Adj. AND adv.: 很突然的变化

exA.cn: 这场雨来得很突然。
exA.py: Zhè chǎng yǔ lái de hěn tūrán.
exA.en: This rain came very suddenly. (突然 as adj. with 很)

exB.cn: 她忽然想起了一件重要的事。
exB.py: Tā hūrán xiǎng qǐ le yí jiàn zhòngyào de shì.
exB.en: She suddenly remembered something important. (忽然 as adverb)

tip: When used as an adverb before a verb, they are interchangeable. The difference: 突然 can also be an adjective (很突然, 突然的变化), but 忽然 CANNOT. If you see 很___ or ___的+noun, it must be 突然.

quiz.stem: 这件事发生得太___了，大家都没准备。
quiz.explain: With 得 + degree = adjective use → only 突然 works.

quiz.stem: 走着走着，___下起了大雨。
quiz.explain: Adverb before verb — both work, but 忽然 is more natural for narrative flow.

quiz.stem: 这是一个非常___的决定。
quiz.explain: Modifying a noun (___的+noun) = adjective → only 突然.

exercises.sentence: 他的决定来得很___，我们都没准备。
exercises.context: With 得 = adjective use, only 突然

exercises.sentence: 走着走着，___下起了大雨。
exercises.context: Narrative flow, both work but 忽然 natural

exercises.sentence: 这是一个非常___的变化。
exercises.context: 突然的+noun = adjective, only 突然

subtitle: so/then (narrative) vs therefore (logical) — both mean 'so' but feel different

exA.cn: 天黑了，于是我们决定回家。
exA.py: Tiān hēi le, yúshì wǒmen juédìng huí jiā.
exA.en: It got dark, so we decided to go home. (narrative sequence)

exB.cn: 他没有认真复习，因此没有通过考试。
exB.py: Tā méiyǒu rènzhēn fùxí, yīncǐ méiyǒu tōngguò kǎoshì.
exB.en: He didn't review seriously; therefore he didn't pass. (logical cause-effect)

tip: 于是 tells a STORY (this happened, then that happened). 因此 makes an ARGUMENT (because of X, therefore Y). In reading passages: 于是 appears in narratives, 因此 in explanatory/analytical texts.

quiz.stem: 他找了很久都没找到，___放弃了。
quiz.explain: Narrative sequence (searched → gave up) → 于是.

quiz.stem: 空气污染越来越严重，___政府采取了新的措施。
quiz.explain: Formal cause-effect analysis → 因此.

quiz.stem: 他看到路边有人摔倒了，___跑过去帮忙。
quiz.explain: Story flow (saw → ran to help) → 于是.

exercises.sentence: 天黑了，___我们决定回家。
空气污染越来越严重，___政府采取了新措施。
他吃完饭___出门了。

subtitle: as long as (sufficient) vs only if (necessary) — opposite logic
rows: Sufficient condition: A is enough for B
As long as A, then B will happen
Only if A, can B happen
A is one of many ways to get B
A is the ONLY way to get B

exA.cn: 只要努力学习，就一定能通过考试。
exA.py: Zhǐyào nǔlì xuéxí, jiù yídìng néng tōngguò kǎoshì.
exA.en: As long as you study hard, you'll definitely pass. (sufficient)

exB.cn: 只有努力学习，才能通过考试。
exB.py: Zhǐyǒu nǔlì xuéxí, cái néng tōngguò kǎoshì.
exB.en: Only by studying hard can you pass. (necessary, no other way)

tip: 只要…就 = A is ENOUGH (optimistic). 只有…才 = A is the ONLY way (stricter). Same topic, different emphasis. This is one of the most frequently tested pairs in HSK 4.

quiz.stem: ___你有信心，___没有做不到的事。
quiz.explain: Confidence is sufficient (optimistic) → 只要…就.

quiz.stem: ___亲自去一趟，___能了解真实情况。
quiz.explain: Going in person is the ONLY way → 只有…才.

quiz.stem: ___坚持锻炼，身体___会越来越好。
quiz.explain: Exercising is enough to improve → 只要…就.

exercises.sentence: ___你每天坚持练习，中文___会越来越好。
___亲自去看看，___能知道那里的情况。
___用心学，___一定能学会。

subtitle: despite (stronger) vs although (standard) — both concessive
rows: Can mean 'feel free to': 你尽管说

exA.cn: 尽管天气很冷，他还是坚持每天跑步。
exA.py: Jǐnguǎn tiānqì hěn lěng, tā háishì jiānchí měitiān pǎobù.
exA.en: Despite the cold weather, he still persists in running daily. (stronger emphasis)

exB.cn: 虽然很累，但是我很开心。
exB.py: Suīrán hěn lèi, dànshì wǒ hěn kāixīn.
exB.en: Although tired, I'm happy. (standard concession)

tip: Both mean 'although/despite' and are often interchangeable. 尽管 is slightly stronger and more emphatic. Unique to 尽管: it can also mean 'feel free to' (你尽管问 = feel free to ask). 虽然 never has this meaning.

quiz.stem: ___路上堵车很严重，他还是准时到了。
quiz.explain: Emphasizing that traffic was bad but he STILL made it → 尽管 (stronger). 虽然 also works.

quiz.stem: 你有什么想法___说，不用客气。
quiz.explain: 'Feel free to say' → only 尽管 has this meaning.

quiz.stem: ___他说得很有道理，但我还是不同意。
quiz.explain: Standard concession → 虽然 is most natural. (尽管 also works.)

exercises.sentence: ___外面很冷，他还是穿得很少。
___我不太喜欢运动，但是我每天都坚持跑步。
你有什么问题___问，不用客气。
exercises.context: Feel free to ask = unique 尽管 usage

subtitle: on earth / exactly — both express urgency in questions
rows: Can sound impatient: 你到底去不去？
After all (conclusion): 她到底是老师
到底 in both questions and statements

exA.cn: 你到底想吃什么？快决定！
exA.py: Nǐ dàodǐ xiǎng chī shénme? Kuài juédìng!
exA.en: What on earth do you want to eat? Decide! (impatient)

exB.cn: 我很想知道事情究竟是怎么发生的。
exB.py: Wǒ hěn xiǎng zhīdào shìqing jiūjìng shì zěnme fāshēng de.
exB.en: I really want to know how it actually happened. (curious, formal)

tip: Both mean 'on earth / exactly' in questions and are usually interchangeable. 到底 is more casual and can sound impatient. 究竟 is more formal and curious. In HSK 4 reading: use context — casual dialogue = 到底, formal passage = 究竟.

quiz.stem: 你___同意不同意？给个明确的答复！
quiz.explain: Impatient demand for answer → 到底.

quiz.stem: 科学家们一直在研究这种植物___有什么作用。
quiz.explain: Formal/scientific context → 究竟.

quiz.stem: 这件事___是谁做的？
quiz.explain: Direct question seeking truth → both work, but 到底 is more common in spoken questions.

exercises.sentence: 你___想吃什么？快决定！
科学家一直在研究这种植物___有什么作用。
你___同意不同意？给个明确的答复！

subtitle: moreover/and — progressive vs parallel
rows: Parallel: and also (A + B side by side)
The second clause is MORE important

exA.cn: 这里的菜不但好吃，而且很便宜。
exA.py: Zhèlǐ de cài búdàn hǎochī, érqiě hěn piányi.
exA.en: The food here is not only delicious, but also cheap. (progressive: cheap is bonus info)

exB.cn: 请仔细阅读合同，并且签上你的名字。
exB.py: Qǐng zǐxì yuèdú hétong, bìngqiě qiān shàng nǐ de míngzì.
exB.en: Please read the contract carefully and sign your name. (parallel: two equal actions)

tip: 而且 = and MOREOVER (the second part adds something impressive or important). 并且 = and ALSO (two actions of equal weight, often instructions). If paired with 不但, always use 而且.

quiz.stem: 请填写这张表格，___交给前台。
quiz.explain: Two equal actions (fill in + hand in) → 并且.

quiz.stem: 他不但通过了考试，___得了第一名。
quiz.explain: Progressive (passed → and even got 1st place!) → 而且.

quiz.stem: 这个方案既节约成本，___提高了效率。
quiz.explain: Two parallel benefits → 并且. (而且 also acceptable with progressive reading.)

exercises.sentence: 这里的菜不但好吃，___很便宜。
exercises.context: Progressive: cheap is bonus info, pairs with 不但

exercises.sentence: 请填写这张表格，___交给前台。
exercises.context: Two parallel actions of equal weight

exercises.sentence: 他不仅通过了考试，___得了第一名。
exercises.context: Progressive result, pairs with 不仅

subtitle: just (adverb before verb) vs just now (time word)
rows: Time noun: can be subject/object modifier
Must be before verb: 刚到
Flexible: 刚才的话 / 我刚才说的
Can: 刚才的事 (the thing from just now)

exA.cn: 我刚到公司，还没开始工作。
exA.py: Wǒ gāng dào gōngsī, hái méi kāishǐ gōngzuò.
exA.en: I just arrived at the company. (刚 before verb 到)

exB.cn: 刚才那个人是谁？
exB.py: Gāngcái nàge rén shì shéi?
exB.en: Who was that person just now? (刚才 as time word modifying noun)

tip: 刚 = adverb, must go right before a verb (刚吃, 刚到). 刚才 = time noun, can modify nouns (刚才的电话) or stand alone as a time reference. Test: can you put 的 after it? Yes → 刚才. No → 刚.

quiz.stem: 我___吃完饭，现在不饿。
quiz.explain: Before verb 吃完 → adverb 刚.

quiz.stem: ___的那个电话是谁打来的？
quiz.explain: 刚才的 + noun → time noun 刚才.

quiz.stem: 她___说了什么？我没听清。
quiz.explain: Referring to a specific moment 'just now' → 刚才. (刚 also works grammatically here.)

exercises.sentence: 我___到公司，还没开始工作。
exercises.context: Before verb 到 = adverb 刚

exercises.sentence: ___的那个电话是谁打来的？
他___说了什么？我没听清。
exercises.context: Referring to a moment just now

subtitle: severe/impressive vs serious/grave — positive vs negative

exA.cn: 她中文说得太厉害了！/ 外面风刮得很厉害。
exA.py: Tā zhōngwén shuō de tài lìhai le! / Wàimiàn fēng guā de hěn lìhai.
exA.en: Her Chinese is amazing! / The wind outside is fierce. (positive + negative uses)

exB.cn: 空气污染问题越来越严重了。
exB.py: Kōngqì wūrǎn wèntí yuè lái yuè yánzhòng le.
exB.en: Air pollution is getting more and more serious. (always negative)

tip: 厉害 is versatile — compliment (你真厉害!) or describe severity (疼得厉害). 严重 is ONLY for bad situations (严重的问题/污染/错误). Never say ×你真严重 as a compliment.

quiz.stem: 这次的交通事故非常___，好几个人受伤了。
quiz.explain: Accident = negative situation → 严重.

quiz.stem: 他一个人就把这个项目做完了，真___！
quiz.explain: Praising someone → 厉害 (impressive).

quiz.stem: 最近雾霾越来越___了，出门要戴口罩。
quiz.explain: Smog getting worse = negative problem → 严重. (厉害 also possible but 严重 is more precise.)

exercises.sentence: 这次的交通事故非常___，好几个人受伤了。
他一个人就把这个项目做完了，真___！
最近雾霾越来越___了。

subtitle: even if (hypothetical) vs despite (factual)
rows: Even if (假设): hasn't happened yet
即使下雨我也去 (even if it rains)
尽管下着雨他还是去了 (despite the rain)

exA.cn: 即使明天下雪，我也要去上班。
exA.py: Jíshǐ míngtiān xià xuě, wǒ yě yào qù shàng bān.
exA.en: Even if it snows tomorrow, I'll still go to work. (hypothetical — hasn't snowed yet)

exB.cn: 尽管外面下着大雨，他还是出门了。
exB.py: Jǐnguǎn wàimiàn xià zhe dà yǔ, tā háishì chū mén le.
exB.en: Despite the heavy rain outside, he still went out. (factual — it IS raining)

tip: 即使 = EVEN IF (hypothetical, 假设 — the situation has NOT happened yet or may not happen). 尽管 = DESPITE (factual, 事实 — the situation IS true or HAS happened). Check: has it happened? Yes → 尽管. Not yet / might not → 即使. This is one of the most tested distinctions at HSK 4.

quiz.stem: ___价格再贵，这个东西我也要买。
quiz.explain: Hypothetical (price might be high) → 即使.

quiz.stem: ___他已经道歉了，她还是不肯原谅他。
quiz.explain: He already apologized (factual) → 尽管.

quiz.stem: ___困难再大，我们也不会放弃。
quiz.explain: Hypothetical future difficulty → 即使.

exercises.sentence: ___明天下大雪，我们也要按时出发。
___他已经很努力了，但结果还是不理想。
___条件再差，我也不会放弃。

subtitle: three ways to say passive — formal vs spoken

exA.cn: 他被公司解雇了。
exA.py: Tā bèi gōngsī jiěgù le.
exA.en: He was fired by the company.

exB.cn: 我的手机让弟弟摔坏了。/ 妈妈叫我去买菜。
exB.py: Wǒ de shǒujī ràng dìdi shuāi huài le. / Māma jiào wǒ qù mǎi cài.
exB.en: My phone was broken by brother. / Mom told me to buy groceries.

tip: 被 is ONLY passive. 让/叫 are BOTH passive AND causative. If 让 has no negative outcome, it is probably causative (let), not passive.

quiz.stem: 这个消息___很多人感到惊讶。
quiz.explain: Causative: news MADE people surprised → 让.

quiz.stem: 我的自行车___人偷走了。
quiz.explain: Formal passive → 被.

quiz.stem: 老师___他重新写一遍作业。
quiz.explain: Causative: teacher TOLD him → 叫.

exercises.sentence: 这首歌___我想起了小时候的事。
他的钱包___小偷偷走了。
妈妈___我去超市买点东西。
exercises.context: Causative: mom TOLD me to go

subtitle: learned skill vs ability vs permission

exA.cn: 她会说三种语言。
exA.py: Tā huì shuō sān zhǒng yǔyán.
exA.en: She can speak three languages. (learned skill)

exB.cn: 你今天能来吗？/ 这里不可以抽烟。
exB.py: Nǐ jīntiān néng lái ma? / Zhèlǐ bù kěyǐ chōuyān.
exB.en: Can you come today? / Smoking not allowed here.

tip: 会 = learned how to. 能 = able or conditions allow. 可以 = permitted. Negative test: 不会 = never learned; 不能 = unable; 不可以 = not allowed.

quiz.stem: 你___弹钢琴吗？
quiz.explain: Asking about learned skill → 会.

quiz.stem: 我感冒了，今天不___去上班。
quiz.explain: Circumstance prevents → 不能.

quiz.stem: 老师，我___出去一下吗？
quiz.explain: Asking permission → 可以.

exercises.sentence: 你___用筷子吃饭吗？
图书馆里不___大声说话。
他受伤了，不___参加比赛。
exercises.context: Unable due to circumstance = 不能

subtitle: completed/experienced vs ongoing state

exA.cn: 我吃了午饭。/ 我去过北京。
exA.py: Wǒ chī le wǔfàn. / Wǒ qù guò Běijīng.
exA.en: I ate lunch. / I have been to Beijing.

exB.cn: 门开着呢，快关上。
exB.py: Mén kāi zhe ne, kuài guān shàng.
exB.en: The door is open — close it.

tip: 了 = just happened or changed. 过 = experienced before. 着 = state continuing NOW. Test: 吃了 (finished eating) vs 吃过 (have eaten before) vs 吃着饭看电视 (eating while watching TV).

quiz.stem: 墙上挂___一幅画。
quiz.explain: Ongoing state (hanging there) → 着.

quiz.stem: 你___中国菜吗？好不好吃？
quiz.explain: Past experience → 过.

quiz.stem: 他已经走___，你找不到他了。
quiz.explain: Completed action (he left) → 了.

exercises.sentence: 你以前吃___北京烤鸭吗？
外面下___雨，别忘了带伞。
他昨天买___一双新鞋。

subtitle: or (questions) vs or (statements)
rows: Statements: 你可以喝茶或者咖啡

exA.cn: 你是坐地铁还是打车？
exA.py: Nǐ shì zuò dìtiě háishi dǎ chē?
exA.en: Subway or taxi? (choose one)

exB.cn: 周末你可以看电影或者去爬山。
exB.py: Zhōumò nǐ kěyǐ kàn diànyǐng huòzhě qù páshān.
exB.en: Weekend: watch a movie or go hiking.

tip: 还是 = or (in QUESTIONS, asking someone to choose). 或者 = or (in STATEMENTS, listing options). The most reliable test: is it a question? → 还是. Is it a statement? → 或者. Exception: 还是…吧 can appear in statements as advice meaning "had better" (还是别去了吧 = you'd better not go).

quiz.stem: 你想吃中餐___西餐？
quiz.explain: Question → 还是.

quiz.stem: 你可以坐公交___骑自行车去。
quiz.explain: Statement → 或者.

quiz.stem: ___我们换一个时间吧。
quiz.explain: Suggesting alternative → 或者.

exercises.sentence: 周末你想在家休息___出去玩？
你可以坐公交___打车去公司。
你喜欢吃米饭___面条？

subtitle: definitely vs maybe — certainty spectrum

exA.cn: 我明天一定来，你放心吧。
exA.py: Wǒ míngtiān yídìng lái, nǐ fàngxīn ba.
exA.en: I will definitely come tomorrow.

exB.cn: 他今天可能不来了。
exB.py: Tā jīntiān kěnéng bù lái le.
exB.en: He might not come today.

tip: 一定 = definitely. 可能 = maybe. Key: 不一定 ≠ 不可能. 不一定 = not necessarily. 不可能 = impossible.

quiz.stem: 他那么努力，___能考上好大学。
quiz.explain: Confident expectation → 一定.

quiz.stem: 明天___会下雨，你带把伞吧。
quiz.explain: Uncertain weather → 可能.

quiz.stem: 这件事不___是他做的。
quiz.explain: 不一定 = not necessarily → 一定.

exercises.sentence: 放心吧，我___会准时到的。
他没接电话，___是在开会。
这件事不___是他做的，别冤枉人。

subtitle: should vs must — advice vs obligation
rows: 不必/不用 = don't need to

exA.cn: 你应该多运动，对身体好。
exA.py: Nǐ yīnggāi duō yùndòng, duì shēntǐ hǎo.
exA.en: You should exercise more.

exB.cn: 考试时必须关掉手机。
exB.py: Kǎoshì shí bìxū guāndiào shǒujī.
exB.en: You must turn off your phone during exams.

tip: 应该 = should (advice, can decline). 必须 = must (rule). Also: 应该 means probably (他应该到家了), 必须 never does.

quiz.stem: 你___早点休息。
quiz.explain: Friendly advice → 应该.

quiz.stem: 18岁以下___有家长陪同。
quiz.explain: Mandatory rule → 必须.

quiz.stem: 现在九点了，他___快到了。
quiz.explain: Estimation (probably) → 应该.

exercises.sentence: 你___早点休息，明天还要上班。
18岁以下___有家长陪同才能进入。
现在九点了，他___快到了。

subtitle: want (wish) vs want (will/demand)
rows: 要 = need to: 你要努力

exA.cn: 我想去旅行，但是没有时间。
exA.py: Wǒ xiǎng qù lǚ xíng, dànshì méiyǒu shíjiān.
exA.en: I want to travel, but no time. (wish)

exB.cn: 快点！飞机要起飞了！
exB.py: Kuài diǎn! Fēijī yào qǐfēi le!
exB.en: Hurry! Plane is about to take off!

tip: 想 = wish (may not happen). 要 = decision/certainty. Negatives: 不想 = rather not (polite); 不要 = don't! (imperative).

quiz.stem: 我___喝一杯咖啡。
quiz.explain: Polite wish → 想.

quiz.stem: 你不___在教室里吃东西！
quiz.explain: Command/prohibition → 不要.

quiz.stem: 快看，太阳___出来了！
quiz.explain: About to happen → 要…了.

exercises.sentence: 我___喝一杯咖啡。
你不___在教室里吃东西！
快看，太阳___出来了！

subtitle: even more (degree) vs also/still (addition)
rows: Even more: 更好, 比…更…
Still: 还在; also: 还有
比A更B = even more B than A

exA.cn: 今天比昨天更冷了。
exA.py: Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān gèng lěng le.
exA.en: Today is even colder than yesterday.

exB.cn: 他会说中文，还会说日语。/ 我也想去。
exB.py: Tā huì shuō zhōngwén, hái huì shuō rìyǔ. / Wǒ yě xiǎng qù.
exB.en: He speaks Chinese and also Japanese. / I also want to go.

tip: 更 = EVEN MORE (intensifies). 还 = ALSO/STILL (adds). With 比: 更 emphasizes degree, 还 implies surprise.

quiz.stem: 这次考试___难，很多人没通过。
quiz.explain: Even more difficult → 更.

quiz.stem: 除了中文，他___学了日语。
quiz.explain: Also learned → 还.

quiz.stem: 这件事我一点儿___不知道。
quiz.explain: Emphasis (not at all) → 一点儿也不.

exercises.sentence: 这次考试___难，很多人没通过。
除了中文，他___学了日语。
他___在睡觉，别叫他。

subtitle: after (general future) vs after (specific event)
rows: 吃饭以后 = 吃饭之后

exA.cn: 以后你要更加努力。
exA.py: Yǐhòu nǐ yào gèngjiā nǔlì.
exA.en: In the future, work harder.

exB.cn: 毕业之后，他去了上海工作。
exB.py: Bìyè zhīhòu, tā qù le Shànghǎi gōngzuò.
exB.en: After graduating, he went to Shanghai.

tip: Both mean after [event]. Only 以后 can stand alone meaning in the future. 之后 always needs a preceding event.

quiz.stem: ___别再犯同样的错误了。
quiz.explain: General future (from now on) → 以后.

quiz.stem: 比赛结束___，大家一起去吃饭。
quiz.explain: After specific event → 之后.

quiz.stem: 长大___你想做什么工作？
quiz.explain: General future life → 以后.

exercises.sentence: ___别再犯同样的错误了。
比赛结束___，大家一起去吃饭。
长大___你想做什么？

subtitle: heard that vs think/believe — hearsay vs opinion

exA.cn: 听说他要去美国留学。
exA.py: Tīngshuō tā yào qù Měiguó liúxué.
exA.en: I heard he is going to study in the US.

exB.cn: 我觉得这个主意不错。/ 我认为应该改变计划。
exB.py: Wǒ juéde zhège zhǔyì bùcuò. / Wǒ rènwéi yīnggāi gǎi biàn jìhùa.
exB.en: I think this idea is good. / I believe we should change the plan.

tip: 听说 = someone else said. 觉得 = your casual feeling. 认为 = your formal considered view.

quiz.stem: ___明天要下雨。
quiz.explain: Heard from others → 听说.

quiz.stem: 我___这样做不太合适。
quiz.explain: Personal feeling → 觉得.

quiz.stem: 专家们___这个方法最有效。
quiz.explain: Formal expert opinion → 认为.

exercises.sentence: ___明天要下雨，我们改天再去吧。
我___这样做不太合适。
专家们___这个方法最有效。

subtitle: about (topic) vs toward (attitude) — the most-tested formal preposition pair
rows: Marks the target of an attitude/action
Usually at the start of the sentence: 关于…，…
Often pairs with 我有一些看法/我们讨论了…
Often pairs with 表示同意/感到…

exA.cn: 关于这个问题，我有自己的看法。
exA.py: Guānyú zhège wèntí, wǒ yǒu zìjǐ de kànfǎ.
exA.en: Regarding this issue, I have my own view. (introducing a topic)

exB.cn: 对于这个问题，我感到很失望。
exB.py: Duìyú zhège wèntí, wǒ gǎndào hěn shīwàng.
exB.en: Toward this issue, I feel very disappointed. (showing attitude)

tip: 关于 introduces what something is ABOUT — neutral, like a topic header. 对于 expresses the speaker's ATTITUDE TOWARD something — opinion, feeling, judgement. If you can replace it with 'regarding the topic of', use 关于. If with 'in my view of', use 对于.

quiz.stem: ___HSK 考试，老师给了我们很多建议。
quiz.explain: Introducing a topic (HSK exam) → 关于.

quiz.stem: ___这件事，我和父母的看法不一样。
quiz.explain: Both work here, but the focus on opinion difference favors 对于.

quiz.stem: 他写了一本___中国文化的书。
quiz.explain: Topic of the book → 关于. 对于 cannot modify a noun this way.

exercises.sentence: ___学习汉语，最重要的是坚持。
___他的离开，大家都感到很难过。
这是一篇___环境保护的文章。

subtitle: because (informal/spoken) vs due to (formal/written) — same meaning, different register
rows: Often pairs with 因此/因而 (NOT 所以)
Almost always in the first clause
Can answer 'why?' as a standalone reply
Cannot stand alone as a reply

exA.cn: 因为下雨，所以我没去公园。
exA.py: Yīnwèi xià yǔ, suǒyǐ wǒ méi qù gōngyuán.
exA.en: Because it was raining, I didn't go to the park.

exB.cn: 由于天气原因，今天的航班取消了。
exB.py: Yóuyú tiānqì yuányīn, jīntiān de hángbān qǔxiāo le.
exB.en: Due to the weather, today's flight has been cancelled.

tip: Both mean 'because/due to'. 因为 is the everyday word — use it in conversation. 由于 sounds more formal — use it in writing, news reports, or official notices. KEY ERROR: 由于 pairs with 因此/所以 in writing, but never use 由于…就… or 由于…才…. Also: when answering 'why', say 因为…, never 由于….

quiz.stem: A: 你为什么迟到？\nB: ___堵车。
quiz.explain: 由于 cannot be used as a standalone reply to a question.

quiz.stem: ___交通堵塞，会议被迫推迟到明天。
quiz.explain: Formal news-style sentence → 由于 is more natural.

quiz.stem: 他___生病了，所以请了假。
quiz.explain: Daily conversational tone → 因为. 由于…所以 is grammatical but stylistically clashing.

exercises.sentence: ___身体不舒服，他没来上班。
___你的帮助，我才能完成这个项目。
我没去看电影，___我没买到票。

subtitle: to suit (person/preference) vs to conform (rule/standard)
rows: 适合你 / 适合这个场合 / 适合学习
符合规定 / 符合要求 / 符合标准 / 符合条件

exA.cn: 这件衣服很适合你。
exA.py: Zhè jiàn yīfu hěn shìhé nǐ.
exA.en: This dress suits you well. (subjective fit)

exB.cn: 你的回答不符合要求。
exB.py: Nǐ de huídá bù fúhé yāoqiú.
exB.en: Your answer doesn't meet the requirements. (objective standard)

tip: 适合 = is a good match for someone or some situation (taste, preference, occasion). 符合 = matches an objective standard, rule, or expectation. If you can ask 'fits whom/what occasion?' → 适合. If you can ask 'meets what standard?' → 符合. HSK 4 frequently tests this in fill-in-the-blank questions.

quiz.stem: 这份工作很___他的兴趣。
quiz.explain: Personal interest/preference → 适合. (We don't say 符合兴趣.)

quiz.stem: 他的条件完全___公司的要求。
quiz.explain: Meeting company requirements (objective standard) → 符合.

quiz.stem: 这个时间___你吗？
quiz.explain: Whether the time suits the listener (personal convenience) → 适合.

exercises.sentence: 这个礼物很___他的口味。
exercises.context: 口味/品味 = standards → 符合

exercises.sentence: 夏天去海边旅游最___。
你的方案___大家的期望。

subtitle: to express/indicate vs to perform/show (behavior)
rows: To behave; to perform; to display through actions
表示同意 / 表示感谢 / 表示意见 / 表示祝贺
表现得好 / 表现能力 / 工作表现 / 表现出色

exA.cn: 我向他表示了感谢。
exA.py: Wǒ xiàng tā biǎoshì le gǎnxiè.
exA.en: I expressed my thanks to him. (verbal expression of feeling)

exB.cn: 他在比赛中表现得非常好。
exB.py: Tā zài bǐsài zhōng biǎoxiàn de fēicháng hǎo.
exB.en: He performed very well in the competition. (behavior/performance)

tip: 表示 = make known through words or symbols (express/indicate). 表现 = make visible through actions/behavior (show/perform). EASY TEST: if a word like 'thanks/agreement/opinion' follows, use 表示. If 'well/badly/excellently' (adverb) follows or you're describing how someone behaves, use 表现. Also note 表扬 = to praise (different word — to give praise to someone).

quiz.stem: 他对这个决定___反对。
quiz.explain: Expressing opposition (an attitude) → 表示.

quiz.stem: 她在工作中___得很出色。
quiz.explain: Performing well at work (behavior) → 表现.

quiz.stem: 这个标志___禁止吸烟。
quiz.explain: A sign indicating something → 表示 (symbolic meaning).

exercises.sentence: 请允许我向您___祝贺。
今天他___得有点儿奇怪。
他的脸上___出非常激动的样子。

subtitle: to attach importance to vs to respect — both feel like 'respect' in English
rows: To respect / honor / show regard for
重视教育 / 重视健康 / 重视这个问题
尊重老师 / 尊重别人的意见 / 尊重文化
看不起 / 不尊重 (to disrespect)

exA.cn: 父母非常重视孩子的教育。
exA.py: Fùmǔ fēicháng zhòngshì háizi de jiàoyù.
exA.en: Parents attach great importance to their children's education.

exB.cn: 我们应该尊重每一个人的选择。
exB.py: Wǒmen yīnggāi zūnzhòng měi yí gè rén de xuǎnzé.
exB.en: We should respect everyone's choices.

tip: 重视 = treat as important (focus, value, prioritize) — usually with abstract things, issues, or topics. 尊重 = give respect (honor, regard) — usually with people, their opinions, choices, or cultures. KEY: 重视 cannot take a person as direct object. We say 尊重老师, NOT 重视老师 (unless you mean 'value the teacher's input', which is unusual). Also note 重视 is closer to 'value' while 尊重 is closer to 'show respect to'.

quiz.stem: 学校很___学生的健康。
quiz.explain: Health is an issue/concern → 重视 (attach importance to).

quiz.stem: 我们要___老人。
quiz.explain: Old people are persons → 尊重 (respect them).

quiz.stem: 他从小就___父母的意见。
quiz.explain: Other people's opinions deserve respect → 尊重. (重视意见 is also possible but means 'take the opinion seriously', a slightly different focus.)

exercises.sentence: 中国文化___礼貌和谦虚。
我们应该___不同的文化。
公司很___员工的意见。

subtitle: Score (test/grade) vs result (research/work) — both 'achievement' but very different scopes
rows: Test/exam score, study performance, sports result
考试成绩 / 学习成绩 / 比赛成绩 / 取得好成绩
研究成果 / 工作成果 / 取得成果 / 重大成果
Specific, often numeric (90 分, 第三名)
Abstract, often a discovery or finished product

exA.cn: 他这次考试的成绩很好。
exA.py: Tā zhè cì kǎoshì de chéngjì hěn hǎo.
exA.en: He scored well on this exam.

exB.cn: 经过几年的研究，我们终于取得了重要成果。
exB.py: Jīngguò jǐ nián de yánjiū, wǒmen zhōngyú qǔdé le zhòngyào chéngguǒ.
exB.en: After years of research, we finally achieved important results.

tip: 成绩 = points/grades — what you get on tests, in competitions, in school. 成果 = the FRUIT of long effort — research findings, work results, project deliverables. KEY ERROR to avoid: never say 考试的成果 or 研究的成绩. Also note 成就 (chéngjiù) = a major life achievement (career milestone), even bigger in scope than 成果.

quiz.stem: 她每次考试___都名列前茅。
quiz.explain: 考试 → score = 成绩. 成果 cannot describe an exam score.

quiz.stem: 经过五年的努力，这个项目终于有了可喜的___。
quiz.explain: Long-term project outcome → 成果. 成绩 is for tests/grades, not project results.

quiz.stem: 她的学习___在班里一直排第一。
quiz.explain: Study performance over time = 成绩. 成果 would imply a finished thing, not ongoing performance.

exercises.sentence: 我的中文___比上学期提高了很多。
这本书是他十年研究的___。
运动会上，他取得了优异的___。

subtitle: Look (general) vs gaze into the distance — when you can't just say 看
rows: To look INTO THE DISTANCE; to visit (formal)
看电影 / 看书 / 看医生 / 看电视 / 看朋友
望远 / 望天 / 探望病人 / 一望无际
Slightly literary; mostly compound or fixed

exA.cn: 我喜欢看中国电影。
exA.py: Wǒ xǐhuān kàn Zhōngguó diànyǐng.
exA.en: I like to watch Chinese movies.

exB.cn: 他站在山顶上望着远方。
exB.py: Tā zhàn zài shāndǐng shàng wàng zhe yuǎnfāng.
exB.en: He stood on the mountaintop, looking far into the distance.

tip: 看 is the everyday default — use it 95% of the time. 望 implies looking far away (远方/远处) or carries the formal sense of 'visiting' someone (探望/看望病人). HSK 4 uses 望 mainly in compound words: 望远镜 (binoculars), 一望无际 (boundless), 探望 (to visit a patient/elder), 失望 (disappointed). You won't use 望 alone often — but recognize it.

quiz.stem: 我每周末都___电影。
quiz.explain: Watching a movie = 看. 望 cannot be used for movies/TV.

quiz.stem: 他站在窗前，___着外面的雪。
quiz.explain: Looking out into the distance (snow falling outside) suits 望 — looking far. 看 also works but 望 fits the literary tone.

quiz.stem: 明天我要去医院___爷爷。
quiz.explain: 看 can mean 'visit'; in HSK 4 contexts, 看 is more natural for visiting a relative. 探望 is formal alternative.

exercises.sentence: 弟弟在房间里___电视。
他___了一眼远处的山。
周末我们去___爷爷奶奶。

subtitle: Through (means/method) vs going through (process/place)
rows: Methods, channels, exams: 通过努力, 通过考试, 通过电话
Places, time periods, processes: 经过医院, 经过三年, 经过努力
Emphasizes the duration or path taken

exA.cn: 他通过努力学习，终于通过了HSK4考试。
exA.py: Tā tōngguò nǔlì xuéxí, zhōngyú tōngguò le HSK4 kǎoshì.
exA.en: Through hard study, he finally passed the HSK 4 exam.

exB.cn: 我每天上班都要经过那家咖啡店。
exB.py: Wǒ měi tiān shàngbān dōu yào jīngguò nà jiā kāfēi diàn.
exB.en: I pass by that coffee shop every day on my way to work.

tip: 通过 + means/method ('via', 'by means of') OR + exam name ('to pass'). 经过 + place/time/process ('go through', 'after a period of'). KEY: 经过努力 (after effort) and 通过努力 (through effort) are both grammatical and slightly different in flavour — 经过 emphasizes the journey, 通过 emphasizes the method.

quiz.stem: 我们___电子邮件保持联系。
quiz.explain: By means of email = 通过. Email is a method/channel.

quiz.stem: 他___三年的努力，终于实现了梦想。
quiz.explain: After three years (a duration) → 经过. Time periods take 经过.

quiz.stem: 明天我们___北京去上海。
quiz.explain: Pass through Beijing (a place) = 经过. 通过 doesn't fit travel routes.

exercises.sentence: 她___努力工作得到了奖金。
去公司的路上要___一座桥。
___这次旅行，我学到了很多。

subtitle: Ordinary (vs special) vs usual (vs unusual) — both 'common' but different opposites
rows: 特别 / 特殊 / 高级 / 重要
异常 / 特别 / 不寻常
普通人 / 普通话 / 普通的衣服 / 普通的生活
平常的日子 / 平常的样子 / 平常很忙 / 像往常一样

exA.cn: 他只是一个普通的工人。
exA.py: Tā zhǐshì yí gè pǔtōng de gōngrén.
exA.en: He is just an ordinary worker.

exB.cn: 他平常很喜欢运动。
exB.py: Tā píngcháng hěn xǐhuān yùndòng.
exB.en: He usually likes to exercise.

tip: 普通 = 'ordinary' as opposed to special/extraordinary (普通人 vs 名人). 平常 = 'usual' as opposed to special occasions (平常 vs 节日). 平常 also works as an adverb meaning 'usually' (= 平时). Don't say 普通时候 — use 平常 or 平时. Also note 日常 (rìcháng) = 'daily', adjective only (日常生活).

quiz.stem: 我只是一个___的学生，没什么特别的。
quiz.explain: Ordinary (as opposed to special) → 普通. Self-deprecating phrase.

quiz.stem: 他___都是六点起床的。
quiz.explain: Usually (= 平时) → 平常 (as adverb). 普通 cannot be an adverb.

quiz.stem: 今天他比___更紧张。
quiz.explain: More than usual → 比平常. 比普通 is ungrammatical.

exercises.sentence: 这是一台很___的电脑，价格不贵。
她___穿得很简单。
他不是一个___的人，做了很多了不起的事。

subtitle: At once (formal) vs right away (spoken) — both 'immediately' with different feel
rows: Very soon (a few seconds to minutes)
立刻去办 / 立刻通知 / 立刻执行
马上来 / 马上回家 / 马上就好

exA.cn: 接到通知后，警察立刻赶到了现场。
exA.py: Jiē dào tōngzhī hòu, jǐngchá lìkè gǎn dào le xiànchǎng.
exA.en: Upon receiving notification, the police immediately rushed to the scene.

exB.cn: 你等一下，我马上就来。
exB.py: Nǐ děng yíxià, wǒ mǎshàng jiù lái.
exB.en: Wait a moment, I'll be right there.

tip: 立刻 = strictly 'at once', formal tone, often in news/orders/business. 马上 = 'right away', everyday spoken Chinese, slightly more flexible (can mean 'in a few minutes'). For HSK 4: use 马上 in dialogue questions and casual contexts; use 立刻 in passages about formal action. 立即 (lìjí) is even more formal — almost identical to 立刻 but less common in HSK 4.

quiz.stem: 妈妈，饭好了，我___下楼。
quiz.explain: Family conversation, casual = 马上. 立刻 sounds too formal in domestic dialogue.

quiz.stem: 公司决定___停止这个项目。
quiz.explain: Formal company decision = 立刻. Both technically work but 立刻 fits the formal register.

quiz.stem: 你别走，___给我打电话。
quiz.explain: Casual instruction to friend = 马上. 立刻 would sound bossy/cold.

exercises.sentence: 听到这个消息，他___给妻子打电话。
你饿了吗？我___去做饭。
请大家___把手机关掉。

subtitle: Continuously (no break) vs always (recurring habit) — frequency vs continuity
rows: From start to now without stopping (continuity)
Spans a continuous period: 一直没回家 (hasn't gone home all this time)
Repeats over time: 总是迟到 (is always late)
一直没/不 = never (during a period)
总是不 = always doesn't = consistently fails to
Speaker observes a state going on
Speaker observes a pattern of behaviour

exA.cn: 我一直在等你的电话，怎么这么久？
exA.py: Wǒ yìzhí zài děng nǐ de diànhuà, zěnme zhème jiǔ?
exA.en: I have been waiting for your call all this time — what took so long?

exB.cn: 他总是迟到，老板已经批评他几次了。
exB.py: Tā zǒngshì chídào, lǎobǎn yǐjīng pīpíng tā jǐ cì le.
exB.en: He is always late — the boss has criticized him several times.

tip: 一直 = continuous (no break), spans a single duration. 总是 = recurring, happens many times. KEY TEST: '从早上到现在我一直在工作' (continuous, single period) vs '他每天总是7点起床' (recurring habit). Don't say '我总是在等你的电话' — that would mean 'every time I'm waiting' (weird) instead of 'I've been waiting all this time'. Also note 常常/经常 = often (less than 总是, allows exceptions).

quiz.stem: 我从早上到现在___在工作，连饭都没吃。
quiz.explain: Continuous single period (from morning until now) → 一直. 总是 implies recurring, doesn't fit a single span.

quiz.stem: 她___笑着回答问题，给人很好的印象。
quiz.explain: Habitual behavior every time she answers → 总是. (一直笑着 would mean 'kept smiling' in one continuous moment.)

quiz.stem: 这件事我___没告诉过任何人。
quiz.explain: Continuously (since it happened) haven't told → 一直没. 总是没 doesn't fit a one-time event.

exercises.sentence: 他___喜欢喝咖啡，每天早上都要喝一杯。
我___在想这个问题，怎么也找不到答案。
她___对人很热情，大家都喜欢她。

subtitle: Often (regular pattern) vs often (general frequency) — almost interchangeable, slight differences

exA.cn: 我经常去那家咖啡店，老板都认识我了。
exA.py: Wǒ jīngcháng qù nà jiā kāfēi diàn, lǎobǎn dōu rènshi wǒ le.
exA.en: I often go to that coffee shop — even the owner knows me now.

exB.cn: 小时候，我常常和爷爷一起去公园。
exB.py: Xiǎoshíhòu, wǒ chángcháng hé yéye yìqǐ qù gōngyuán.
exB.en: When I was little, I often went to the park with grandpa.

tip: Both mean 'often' and are 90% interchangeable. Subtle differences: 经常 emphasizes a REGULAR pattern (predictable timing), 常常 emphasizes general FREQUENCY (without strict regularity). For negation, prefer 不常 over 不常常 / 不经常. 往往 (wǎngwǎng) means 'tend to/usually' and is more analytical — used to describe general tendencies in things or people, not just frequency.

quiz.stem: 我___去图书馆学习，每周至少三次。
quiz.explain: Regular pattern with specific frequency (weekly count) fits 经常 better. 常常 is also acceptable.

quiz.stem: 他___迟到，我们都习惯了。
quiz.explain: Both work; 经常 emphasizes the predictability ('he REGULARLY does this'), 常常 emphasizes frequency.

quiz.stem: 天气好的时候，老人们___在公园里散步。
quiz.explain: Describing a general tendency under conditions → 往往 is most natural. 经常 is okay but less analytical.

exercises.sentence: 他工作以后___加班到深夜。
孩子___把玩具弄得到处都是。
成功的人___在别人休息的时候努力。

subtitle: Quiet (no sound) vs calm (no disturbance) — physical vs emotional
rows: Place, room, person (asking to be quiet)
安静的教室 / 安静地坐着 / 请保持安静
心情平静 / 平静的生活 / 平静的湖面

exA.cn: 图书馆里很安静，大家都在看书。
exA.py: Túshūguǎn lǐ hěn ānjìng, dàjiā dōu zài kàn shū.
exA.en: It's very quiet in the library — everyone is reading.

exB.cn: 听到这个消息后，他的心情才慢慢平静下来。
exB.py: Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi hòu, tā de xīnqíng cái mànmàn píngjìng xiàlái.
exB.en: After hearing the news, his mood slowly calmed down.

tip: 安静 = quiet PHYSICAL environment (no noise). 平静 = calm INTERNAL state (no emotional disturbance) OR a peaceful surface (lake, ocean). KEY ERROR: don't say 心情很安静 — use 心情平静. Don't say 教室很平静 unless you mean the social atmosphere is calm (not just sound-free). HSK 4 candidates often confuse these because both translate as 'quiet/calm' in English.

quiz.stem: 晚上的湖面特别___，像一面镜子。
quiz.explain: Calm lake surface (no waves) → 平静. 安静 wouldn't fit because the lake doesn't make sound issues; it's about stillness.

quiz.stem: 请大家___一下，老师要讲话了。
quiz.explain: Asking for silence in a room → 安静. Imperative form is natural with 安静.

quiz.stem: 经过几年的努力，他的生活终于___了。
quiz.explain: Life becoming peaceful (free from disturbance) → 平静. 安静的生活 would mean 'silent life', which sounds odd.

exercises.sentence: 孩子睡了，请___一点儿。
他听了之后心情很久都不能___。
这个小镇非常___，没有什么噪音。
